title: selaginella bryophila
intro: Selaginella bryophila, also known as Spike moss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against cell damage. Selaginella bryophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various health concerns.
